name: JMC Projects (India) Limited
summary: JMC Projects (India) Limited engages in the business of engineering, procurement, and construction relating to infrastructure sector in India, Ethiopia, and Sri Lanka. The company operates in two segments, Engineering, Procurement and Construction; and Developmental Projects. It undertakes projects, such as residential townships, institutional buildings, office spaces, IT parks, hospitals, medical colleges, hotels, malls or other multi-utility places, etc. The company also provides engineering, design, procurement, and construction services for automobile and ancillary, chemical, food processing, metals, pharmaceutical, and power industries, as well as constructs tourism, and sports complexes and facilities. In addition, it constructs infrastructure projects, such as highways/expressways/roads, flyovers/bridges/elevated corridors, metro rail systems, and other railway projects, as well as water related projects. Further, the company operates and maintains toll roads. JMC Projects (India) Limited was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India. JMC Projects (India) Limited is a subsidiary of Kalpataru Power Transmission Limited.
